tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent collapsed to ~$100.84/bbl on Mar 23 (Bloomberg/Fortune confirmed, -17%) after Trump announced a 5-day pause on Iran power plant strikes; Iran denied direct talks. IRGC struck US Fifth Fleet Bahrain and Prince Sultan airbase the same day — Iran is not standing down. Pause expires Mar 28; if no progress, US escalation resumes. Working range $95-115 in stress; $160+ in tail. PTTEP and Medco remain cleanest ASEAN equity beta; add aggressively on the -17% dip below $105. Do not reduce conviction until confirmed diplomatic breakthrough before Mar 28.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent at $100.84 on Mar 23 (Bloomberg/CNBC confirmed); ASEAN Energy Equities est. -8.6% tracking oil lower. Trump pause created tactical dip — add to energy producers on weakness. Iran's denial of talks and IRGC attacks on Bahrain and Prince Sultan airbase (Al Jazeera, Mar 23) confirm the conflict has not structurally de-escalated. Banks under continued pressure from credit spread widening — iTraxx Asia IG est. ~172bp. Trim energy-over-banks pair only if ceasefire is formally acknowledged by Iran before Mar 28.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short — Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP est. 60.50 (Mar 24, risk-on dip on Trump pause). Brent at $100.84 and JKM est. ~$21.71/MMBtu — Philippines LNG import costs still at crisis-elevated levels. Trump's pause expires Mar 28; Iran denied talks and IRGC struck Bahrain and Saudi Arabia on Mar 23. PHP 60.50 is a re-entry level; next stress target 61.50-62.50 if pause expires with no deal. Stop only if Iran formally acknowledges negotiations and Hormuz commercial transit resumes.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short — Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR est. 17,200 on Mar 24 (risk-on, down from 17,650). Brent at $100.84 still structurally elevated vs $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 6.90%, Bank Indonesia constrained. IRGC struck Bahrain and Saudi Arabia on Mar 23 (Al Jazeera) — Iran's military posture unchanged. IDR 17,000-17,200 is the re-entry zone for shorts; IDR stress target 18,000 on pause expiry with no deal. Reinforce position before Mar 28 deadline.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection — Hold Through Mar 28
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG est. ~172bp on Mar 24 (tightened -13bp on Trump pause); ASEAN HY est. ~525bp (-30bp). Iran denied talks; IRGC struck US Fifth Fleet Bahrain HQ and Prince Sultan airbase on Mar 23 (Al Jazeera). Trump's pause expires Mar 28 — if unsuccessful, US power plant strikes reignite the full tail scenario. 185-200bp is the next stress target on iTraxx Asia IG. Hold CDS protection; do not trim until confirmed ceasefire with Iran's formal acknowledgement of negotiations.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF — Hold Through Mar 28 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM est. ~$21.71/MMBtu (futures, pullback from $23.40 Platts assessment post Qatar Ras Laffan attack, Reuters/Platts). TTF est. ~€61.50/MWh (down from €74.20). Trump pause reduced near-term escalation risk but Qatar Ras Laffan restart remains suspended indefinitely — Iran attacked the hub Mar 19 and the damage assessment has not concluded. If Trump's Mar 28 deadline triggers US power plant strikes, JKM will spike above $23.40. Hold JKM-over-TTF long; add size if pause expires with no deal.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains effectively closed despite the Brent -17% dip to $100.84. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~172bp; ASEAN HY est. ~525bp — unsecured market still inaccessible. Trump's pause expires Mar 28; Iran's military posture unchanged (IRGC struck Bahrain Mar 23). Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures before Mar 28. Every day of delay raises execution risk.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB deteriorates further — TH 10Y est. 2.05%, USD/THB est. 33.20 on Mar 24. Brent at $100.84 still boosts upstream EBITDA but gas import costs via JKM est. $21.71/MMBtu remain acutely elevated. Trump's 5-day pause expires Mar 28; BOT easing probability near zero. Execute H2 2026 prefunding and run sanctions/compliance review on any Gulf JV exposure before the Mar 28 deadline window.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity immediately. Brent $100.84 and JKM est. $21.71 remain structurally elevated vs pre-shock; USD/SGD est. 1.2860. Trump pause created a narrow window to access IG bank markets before Mar 28 — execute before further escalation if talks fail. IRGC attacks on Bahrain and Saudi Arabia on Mar 23 confirm freight-route risk has not abated.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 15%, stress 50%, tail 35%; Brent $100.84; ASEAN HY est. ~525bp. JKM est. $21.71 still spikes gas-fired desalination costs. Trump pause expires Mar 28 — if US strikes resume, tail scenario (oil $160+, LNG markets seized) becomes acute. Unsecured market closed; pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures with maximum urgency before Mar 28.
